steps.title: Spot the requirement for explanation
steps.content: The goal is to “explain why brine pools are toxic.” This “why” signals that the student needs to provide a causal relationship — what causes the toxicity.

steps.title: Match the causal structure to the goal
steps.content:
Choice B connects the extreme salinity directly to the toxicity, using “because” to establish the cause-and-effect relationship the “why” requires. The other three fail to build this causal connection, providing contrasts, irrelevant dates, or definitions instead.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
